message:
test(core): comprehensive snapshot scheduling tests — value accumulation, thresholds, fallback (wa-w9rd)

Adds 12 new tests for intelligent snapshot scheduling: mixed
accumulate+immediate, non-accumulating triggers, exact threshold
boundary, IdleWindow accumulation, multiple immediates, receiver
double-take, custom config values, rapid burst handling, serde
roundtrip, exhaustive db_str/value mappings. Total: 37 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
